characters.appearance: Young adult female with a fair complexion and long brown hair. She has light-colored eyes and wears subtle makeup. Her hair is initially tied up, then worn down.
characters.wardrobe: Beige ribbed turtleneck sweater and a patterned lanyard. Briefly wears a white knit cardigan.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Good morning, everyone. Welcome. [Good morning, everyone. Welcome.]

Character A says: हाँ, अब मैं English में confidently बात कर सकती हूँ। [Yes, now I can converse in English confidently.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by demonstrating fluent English speaking right away.
- Establishes the character's confidence and sets the context of language learning.
- Transitions from English to Hindi to instantly connect with the target demographic.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
How To Speak Fluent English 🇮🇳 Teacher Edition 🇮🇳
Good morning, everyone.
Welcome.
Yes, now I can converse
in English confidently

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: How did I learn to speak English? [How did I learn to speak English?]

Character A says: Teaching में parents और colleagues के साथ connect करना बहुत ज़रूरी है। [In teaching, connecting with parents and colleagues is very important.]

Character A says: पहले English बोलने में डर लगता था, but I wanted to improve. [Earlier I used to feel scared speaking English, but I wanted to improve.]

Character A says: And I'm telling you, the respect you get when you speak fluent English is amazing. [And I'm telling you, the respect you get when you speak fluent English is amazing.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the core problem: hesitation in speaking English affecting professional relationships.
- Builds empathy by sharing a relatable struggle (fear of speaking).
- Highlights the emotional payoff: gaining respect and confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: How To Speak Fluent English 🇮🇳 Teacher Edition 🇮🇳

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: And I practice it right here, in between classes. [And I practice it right here, in between classes.]

Character A says: मैं Supernova app यूज़ करती हूँ। [I use the Supernova app.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the solution (Supernova app) as convenient and practical.
- Shows that learning can fit into a busy working professional's daily routine.
- Visually demonstrates the app interface to build trust.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Speak now...
बहुत बढ़िया!
Excellent!
TAP TO CONTINUE

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: इसमें AI tutor के साथ रोज़ practice करना really easy है, and it has been a game changer for my confidence. [Practicing daily with the AI tutor in this is really easy, and it has been a game changer for my confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the final endorsement, emphasizing ease of use and the AI tutor feature.
- Reinforces the ultimate benefit: a 'game changer' for personal confidence.
- Leaves the viewer feeling encouraged to try it themselves.

- Provides a clear, uncluttered final brand impression.
- Acts as a visual anchor for the call-to-action.
